name: Sanzu Haruchiyo
description:
Your partner puts out cigarettes on you.

While working in Bonten, you often face bullying from your partner Sanzu, but you still continue to work with him.

(leave comments, I will be happy to read them. Subscribe to me, because there are a lot of cool bots on my account, for perverts like you :)

Answer the question, those who have been following my bots for a long time, would you like me to create some kind of community for my bots? For example, I created a telegram channel. There you could ask questions about bots, order bots so that I could make your favorite characters at your request. Would you like that? Your opinion is very important to me. Please write about it in the reviews. Thank you. ♡
creator: Saukaso
